import pytest
from source import pascal

def test_pascal_row_lengths_and_trailing_ones():
    result = pascal(3)
    assert len(result[1]) == 2, f"Row 1 should have 2 elements, got {result[1]}"
    assert len(result[2]) == 3, f"Row 2 should have 3 elements, got {result[2]}"
    assert result[1] == [1, 1], f"Row 1 should be [1, 1], got {result[1]}"
    assert result[2] == [1, 2, 1], f"Row 2 should be [1, 2, 1], got {result[2]}"
